ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the recipe belongs to */,
  "dietary_restrictions_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dietary restriction the recipe belongs to */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories in the recipe */,
  "fat_content" REAL /* Fat content in the recipe */,
  "saturated_fat_content" REAL /* Saturated fat content in the recipe */,
  "cholesterol_content" REAL /* Cholesterol content in the recipe */,
  "sodium_content" REAL /* Sodium content in the recipe */,
  "carbohydrate_content" REAL /* Carbohydrate content in the recipe */,
  "fiber_content" REAL /* Fiber content in the recipe */,
  "sugar_content" REAL /* Sugar content in the recipe */,
  "protein_content" REAL /* Protein content in the recipe */,
  "preparation_time" INTEGER /* Time required to prepare the recipe (in minutes) */,
  "cooking_time" INTEGER /* Time required to cook the recipe (in minutes) */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time required to prepare and cook the recipe (in minutes) */,
  "serving_size" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe yields */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recipe was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_dietary_restrictions_id FOREIGN KEY ("dietary_restrictions_id") REFERENCES dietary_restrictions ("restriction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dietary_restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dietary restriction */,
  "restriction_name" TEXT /* Name of the dietary restriction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dietary restriction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dietary restriction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dietary restriction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrients" (
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe the nutrient belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient (e.g., calories, fat, protein) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the nutrient in the recipe */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the nutrient (e.g., grams, milligrams) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the nutrient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the nutrient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recipe */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recipe was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the recipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reviewing the recipe */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the recipe (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made about the recipe */,
  "helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_reviews_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., nutritionist, chef, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient (e.g., grams, cups) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ingredient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the ingredient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)
